overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a first-person exploration of a snowy gothic castle at night. The camera steadily ascends multiple flights of ornate stone stairs, passing lit lanterns and ivy-covered walls, culminating at a large wooden entrance door.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the base of a grand snow-covered stone staircase flanked by two glowing lanterns. The camera ascends steadily between ornate stone railings, approaching a gothic castle tower visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: secondary staircase along ivy-covered castle wall

events.description: reaches the top of the first flight and turns left onto a secondary staircase

segments.scene_description: After reaching the first landing, the camera turns left onto a secondary staircase running alongside an ivy-covered castle wall. Snow-covered trees become visible in the distance as the ascent continues along the narrower path.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper castle terrace with entrance door

approaches the large wooden entrance door at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the upper landing and ascends the final flight of stairs to a snowy terrace. A massive wooden door with metal studs dominates the end of the path, set within a stone frame and flanked by ivy-covered walls, as the camera approaches the castle entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from the base of a grand staircase up toward the imposing entrance of a gothic castle under a night sky. It begins between two glowing lanterns at the foot of snow-covered stone stairs, moving steadily upward between ornate railings toward a distant tower. As the camera reaches the first landing, it turns left to follow a narrower secondary staircase that runs alongside an ivy-covered wall, revealing snow-dusted trees in the distance. The scene then shifts right at the upper landing to climb the final flight of stairs onto a snowy terrace. Finally, the camera approaches a massive, metal-studded wooden door set within a stone frame and flanked by ivy, marking the arrival at the castle entrance.
